features: CLEAN & FRESH: Elysium Spa Bath Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body,in a restorative bath. Fragranced with rose essential oil in a resealable bag for easy storage

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding restorative salts to a bath before bedtime will soothe, relax and unwind you. Inhale the gentle rose fragrance to aid a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body,in a restorative bath. Adding restorative salts to a bath before bedtime will soothe, relax and unwind you, inhale the gentle rose fragrance to aid a restful night's sleep. Fragranced with rose essential oil in a resealable bag for easy storage 450g. Ingredients Epsomsalt Directions Pour desired amount into running bath water, mix well, and soak for 15-20 minutes for optimal relaxation. Safety Warning Always test the water temperature before entering the bathtub. Avoid using excessive amounts of bath salts as they may cause the bathtub to become slippery. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a physician. Keep out of reach of children and pets. See more
